Generated Wikiwiki site

Use wk as primary CLI identity

Keep Wikiwiki as the brand, rename the scoped package to @thjodann/wk, make wk the primary CLI binary and Commander display name, and preserve wikiwiki as a compatibility alias.

Home / Decisions
Decision clirenameagent-workflow

Context

Wikiwiki is built for agent loops, and agents benefit from a short command while humans still need a friendly product name.

Decision

Keep Wikiwiki as the brand, rename the scoped package to @thjodann/wk, make wk the primary CLI binary and Commander display name, and preserve wikiwiki as a compatibility alias.

Consequences

Agent setup snippets and command hints should prefer wk; .wikiwiki storage, wiki output, and the Thjodann/Wikiwiki GitHub repo remain unchanged for this pass.
